contract_rows.expected_contract: LIVE_FRAME is deterministic-only; no Gemma call and no multimodal panel/backend.
contract_rows.current_evidence: ModelInvocationSchedulerTest passed 15/15, including live frame deterministic skip and live multimodal backend skip.
contract_rows.still_needed: On-device event trace with trigger, decision, context budget, multimodal action, and backend_call_count=0.

contract_rows.expected_contract: Warnings are produced from deterministic evidence refs before any local Gemma explanation.
contract_rows.current_evidence: Pixel smoke shows full analysis PASS and user-facing Why flagged explanations PASS.
contract_rows.still_needed: Per-event log tying warning/monitor verdict to evidence_refs and showing no model-created warning.

contract_rows.comparison: Gemma sidecar output vs deterministic verdict
contract_rows.expected_contract: Gemma may explain or summarize evidence, but cannot change verdict, create warning, cite missing refs, or make forbidden claims.
contract_rows.current_evidence: MultimodalResultValidatorTest passed 5/5: missing refs, verdict mutation, new warning, forbidden claims, and low-confidence overconfidence are rejected.
contract_rows.still_needed: Device validation log for at least one summary/explanation result passed through validator.

contract_rows.comparison: Low confidence / abstain vs hard judgment
contract_rows.expected_contract: Low-confidence evidence maps to abstained/monitor-only UI, not a hard safety judgment.
contract_rows.current_evidence: TrustUiStateTest passed 8/8, including low confidence -> Abstained and pose preview separate from hard judgment.
contract_rows.still_needed: Captured low-confidence/no-person/multi-person clip showing the same behavior on Pixel.

contract_rows.comparison: Session ended summary vs live verdicting
contract_rows.expected_contract: Local Gemma summary runs after analysis; it is not part of per-frame safety verdicting.
contract_rows.current_evidence: Pixel smoke shows Local Gemma summary PASS, first token under 5s, backend litert-lm:isolated:gpu.
contract_rows.still_needed: Trigger-level comparison showing summary call belongs to SESSION_ENDED or equivalent, never LIVE_FRAME.
